text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Narita Taishin to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's not a big deal. It'll probably just heal on
its own.
choice_data_list: I'd rather it not get worse.
I'd rather it not get worse.
Okay! Then let's get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's not a big deal. It'll probably just heal on
its own.
choice_data_list: I'd rather it not get worse.
I'd rather it not get worse.
Okay! Then let's get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, bug off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you really think I'm some frail wimp?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I'm shorter than the others? Because
I'm tiny and weak? Is that it?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't need you to!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you stop worrying and use your time to
think up a training regimen?
choice_data_list: Will you rest in the meantime?
Will you rest in the meantime?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she agrees to rest, I'll happily think up as many
regimens as she'd like, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not what I'm getting at! Are you even
listening to me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I don't even know why I bother with you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin loses her will to keep arguing and
consequently agrees to receive treatment for her
injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to place my trust in her, as she's
probably the person who knows herself best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Should have started with that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Okay, clearly that injury is affecting—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, be quiet! I can keep going!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can keep running! I have to... keep running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand her impatience, but it would be
dangerous to let her continue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to calm her down and cut training short
for the day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... You see?
choice_data_list: Seems like your injury really is fine.
Seems like your injury really is fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Duh. No way in hell I'm gonna let something that
small hold me back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta do more training than anyone else if I
hope to beat them.
choice_data_list: But you also need to take care of your body.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're such a nag.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Stop hounding me and let me train
already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won't have to deal with you hovering over me all
the time once I get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her complaints, Narita Taishin finishes
the full training session.
